title: Recursive parameter creates Infinite loop in Verilator --lint-only

features.name: type parameter self-reference with imported typedef shadowing
features.description: Code should include a parameter type declaration where the type value references the parameter itself, creating a recursive definition that shadows an imported typedef of the same name

features.name: package typedef used as parameter type with same-named local parameter
features.description: Code should include a module with an imported package typedef and a local type parameter of the same name, where the parameter shadows the imported type
